prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your parenting guidance forward
items: Research and identify 3 different parenting philosophies or approaches that align with your values
Create a family mission statement outlining your core values and parenting goals
Schedule and attend a parenting class or workshop in your community
Interview and select a trusted pediatrician for your child\
Research and create a list of 5 essential parenting resources and support systems in your area
